details: A Solana private-key drainer disguised as a pump[.]fun SDK. The verifyParams() function in pumpfun.mjs takes a Solana Keypair, bs58-encodes the full secretKey (the wallet's private key), and silently sends it via an HTTP GET fetch to hxxps://verify.pumpsol[.]net/?pk=<exfiltrated-key>. The call is triggered during createAndBuy() and getCreateInstructions(), so any developer using this SDK to create a token on pump[.]fun has their Solana wallet drained. The domain pumpsol[.]net typosquats pump[.]fun, and all errors are silently caught via.catch(()=>{}) so the developer never sees the exfiltration.
